title: A Stong-Hattori spectral sequence
journal: Transactions of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
Let

      )

 be the Adams summand of connective K-theory localized at the prime p. Let

 be Brown-Peterson homology for that prime. A spectral sequence is constructed with

 term determined by
